projectDescription: A session-scoped skill loader for ChatGPT Projects that lets you package reusable skills as ZIP files, unpack them into the Project runtime, and explicitly mount them as active context for the current session.
keyFeatures: Session-scoped skill activation — skills are active only inside the current chat session
Explicit lifecycle commands (SKILL CORE UNPACK, SKILL <name> UNPACK, SKILL <name> LOAD)
ZIP-based skill packages with MANIFEST.json declaring load_sequence, support_files, tool_files, and asset_files
Fallback and explicit manifest modes for simple and complex skill packages
Build script (build_packages.py) with full package validation including path safety and ZIP entry checks
Included skill-adapter skill for inspecting and adapting external skill packages
No hooks, no persistent state, no automatic routing, no marketplace behavior
Cooperative skill composition — multiple skills can be active in the same session
publicApiSurface: SKILL CORE UNPACK — boot the core from GPT.SKILLS.zip
SKILL <name> UNPACK — install a skill ZIP into /mnt/data/GPT.SKILLS/SKILLS/<name>/
SKILL <name> LOAD — mount an installed skill as semantically active in the current session
MANIFEST.json (core) — fields: system_name, version, primary_file, load_sequence, optional_load_sequence
MANIFEST.json (skill) — fields: skill_name, version, primary_file, load_sequence, support_files, tool_files, asset_files, capabilities, runtime_hints
scripts/build_packages.py — build and validate GPT.SKILLS.zip and skill ZIPs
skill-adapter — inspect and adapt external skill packages; produces PASS/PASS_WITH_WARNINGS/BLOCKED compatibility report
